zh.Of Bickerton, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德比可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當David de Egerton於大約1277年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親Phillip de Egerton24歲，母親Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x19歲。他於1295年與Isabella Fulleshurst在英國爾馬爾帕斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1362年在他的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.Of Bickerton, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德比可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de Egerton于大约1277年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，他的父亲Phillip de Egerton24岁，母亲Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x19岁。他于1295年与Isabella Fulleshurst在英国爾馬爾帕斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1362年在他的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When David de Egerton was born about 1277, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, Phillip de Egerton, was 24 and his mother, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, was 19. He married Isabella Fulleshurst in 1295, in Malpas, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1362, in his hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David d’Egerton est né environ 1277, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Phillip d’Egerton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Fulleshurst en 1295, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1362, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de Egerton um 1277 in Egerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Phillip de Egerton 24 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x 19. Er hat 1295 in Malpas, Cheshire, England Isabella Fulleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1362 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de Egerton è nato il circa 1277 nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Phillip de Egerton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Fulleshurst nel 1295, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1362, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David de Egertonが約1277年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Phillip de Egertonは24歳，母Lady Margaret De Wrenbury xは19歳であった。1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスでIsabella Fulleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1362年に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David de Egerton(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip de Egerton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1295년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 Isabella Fulleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1362년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de Egerton nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip de Egerton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Fulleshurst em 1295, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1362, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de Egerton родился около 1277 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Phillip de Egerton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Fulleshurst в 1295 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1362 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de Egerton nació aproximadamente 1277, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Phillip de Egerton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabella Fulleshurst en 1295, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1362, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
